## Working notes

This seed article exists to make the layout do real work. It includes enough text to wrap, enough structure to test headings, and enough repetition to make spacing mistakes visible. Curabitur non sem vitae justo gravida cursus. Donec a turpis sed ipsum tristique hendrerit.

## Practical shape

A useful test page should not be perfectly symmetrical. Some paragraphs are short. Others run longer so cards, previews, and detail pages have to prove that they can handle uneven content without looking accidental.
